tagline: 100% Pure Veg · FSSAI Approved · Cooked Fresh Daily
description: Mumma's Menu is a 100% pure veg, FSSAI-approved home-style cloud kitchen in Vadodara serving freshly made parathas, theplas, sabji, khichdi, farali specials and comfort-food Maggie — cooked daily with no artificial colours and a whole lot of love. Order on WhatsApp in seconds.

about.heading: From Mumma's kitchen, straight to your door
about.story: Every dish starts the same way — Mumma wakes up early, picks fresh ingredients, and cooks with the same recipes she's made for her family for decades. No shortcuts, no artificial colours, no preservatives. Just real, honest, 100% vegetarian home-style food.
paragraphs: Mumma's Menu was born out of a simple idea: the best food you've ever had was probably made at home. We started as a small cloud kitchen in Vadodara because we believed that homestyle cooking shouldn't stay locked inside four walls.

Every paratha is hand-rolled. Every thepla is spiced fresh. Every sabji is slow-cooked the way your mumma would. And when you order, you get it delivered as if it came straight from our kitchen — because it does.

testimonials.name: Priya S.
testimonials.text: The Aloo Paratha is exactly like what my mom used to make. Soft, buttery, and full of love. Ordering every week now!

testimonials.name: Rahul M.
testimonials.text: Cheese Tadka Maggie is insane! And delivery was super fast. Love that everything is pure veg and freshly cooked.

testimonials.name: Kavita D.
testimonials.text: Best farali food I've had outside my home. The Sabudana Wada is crispy outside, soft inside — perfect for Ekadashi.

faq.question: How do I place an order on Mumma's Menu?
faq.answer: Browse the menu, add items to your cart, then tap 'Checkout on WhatsApp'. Your complete order summary is pre-filled into a WhatsApp message — just hit send and we'll confirm within minutes.

faq.question: Is Mumma's Menu 100% vegetarian?
faq.answer: Yes! Mumma's Menu is a 100% pure vegetarian kitchen. Not a single non-veg item is cooked or stored here. Safe for strict vegetarians and Jains.

faq.question: Is Mumma's Menu FSSAI approved?
faq.answer: Yes! Mumma's Menu is a fully FSSAI-licensed cloud kitchen. We follow strict hygiene standards and cook every dish fresh daily with no artificial colours or preservatives.

faq.question: Does Mumma's Menu use artificial colours or preservatives?
faq.answer: Never. Every dish at Mumma's Menu is freshly cooked with natural ingredients and home-style recipes handed down through generations. No artificial colours, no preservatives.

faq.question: What are the most popular dishes?
faq.answer: Our bestsellers are Aloo Paratha (₹80), Paneer Butter Masala (₹110), and Cheese Tadka Maggie (₹100). The Sabudana Khichdi is a favourite on fasting days.

faq.question: Do you have options for fasting (Farali) days?
faq.answer: Yes! Our Farali section includes Sabudana Khichdi, Sabudana Wada, and Farali Chutney — all cooked to Maharashtrian fasting standards with no onion or garlic.

faq.question: What are your delivery areas and charges?
faq.answer: We currently deliver within Vadodara, Gujarat. Delivery charges vary by distance and are shared over WhatsApp when your order is confirmed. Orders above ₹200 may qualify for free delivery — ask us on WhatsApp!

faq.question: How do I pay for my order?
faq.answer: Payment details — UPI, cash on delivery, or bank transfer — are shared directly over WhatsApp when your order is confirmed. We accept most payment methods.

faq.question: Can I customise my order?
faq.answer: Absolutely! Just mention your preferences in the special instructions when checking out — extra butter, less spice, no onion — and we'll do our best to accommodate.

deliveryNote: Delivery charges vary by distance, shared over WhatsApp. Free delivery on orders above ₹200 (within select areas).

retention.promoText: 🎉 First order? Get a complimentary farali chutney on us!
